user.title: OpenObserve
user.description: Forward Home Assistant logs and events to your OpenObserve instance.

data_description.base_url: Base URL without trailing slash, e.g. http://10.20.0.54:5080

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to OpenObserve. Check URL and network.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check username and password.

abort.already_configured: This OpenObserve instance is already configured.

data.event_based_logging: Use system log events for logs

data_description.capture_logs: Ship Python log records to the log stream (home_assistant_logs)
data_description.capture_events: Ship HA bus events to the event stream (home_assistant_events)
data_description.log_level: Only applies when capturing logs; filters by severity
data_description.state_changed_exclude: One glob pattern per line, e.g. sensor.*
data_description.event_based_logging: Use HA system_log_event bus events instead of the logging handler. Requires system_log.fire_event: true in configuration.yaml
